title: Asuka the independent deuteragonist
wikitext:
[]: Asuka: the independent deuteragonist             Quote Post by Waffle Wars » Thu May 20, 2021 7:53 pm ElMariachi#923315 wrote: I would say Asuka is still the deuteragonist in Shin, since she is the character (apart from Shinji) who has a level of relevance on all parts of the movie. That said, it's true that Asuka's role in Shin is more independent from Shinji than previous deutersgonists.

[]: Re: Asuka: the independent deuteragonist             Quote Post by bogusman » Thu May 20, 2021 9:45 pm Waffle Wars wrote: Konja7#923319 wrote:

[]: Re: Asuka: the independent deuteragonist             Quote Post by Konja7 » Fri May 21, 2021 7:28 am bogusman wrote: I often wonder, when Asuka returns form instrumentality as an adult, is that also the time has also lapse for years (let's say 14 years) so that people around her has also aged according to that time, idk.
